verdict_obj.summary: This PR adds a trivial arithmetic theorem explicitly labelled 'Throwaway' with no connection to any roadmap target. It is not a prerequisite for any roadmap node and exists solely to verify an infrastructure/quota check.

findings.issue: The added theorem `quotaCheck` is self-described as 'Throwaway' and advances no roadmap target. It is not a prerequisite for any node in the roadmap — it is purely an operational test of the review pipeline and Codex quota.
findings.fix: Remove the theorem entirely. If pipeline/quota verification is needed, use a dedicated CI script or scratch branch, not a permanent library commit.
findings.evidence: Docstring reads 'Throwaway: confirm codex quota restored + live review path.' No roadmap file in ./roadmap contains any node requiring `0 < 13` or any arithmetic lemma of this form; the material has no path to any target.
